events.name: New York Giants at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: Mitchell Trubisky threw two touchdown passes and the Chicago Bears hung on to beat the New York Giants 17-13 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Trubisky 2 TD passes, Barkley hurt as Bears edge Giants

headlines.description: Greg Zuerlein kicked a 46-yard field goal as time expired, and the Dallas Cowboys overcame four fumbles and a 20-point deficit in the first quarter to beat the Atlanta Falcons 40-39 in coach Mike McCarthy's home debut Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cowboys' rally stuns Falcons 40-39 in McCarthy's home debut

events.name: Detroit Lions at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: Aaron Jones rushed for a career-high 168 yards and scored three touchdowns, including a 75-yard breakaway, as the Green Bay Packers rallied from an early 11-point deficit to beat the Detroit Lions 42-21 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones' big day helps Packers beat Lions 42-21 in home opener

headlines.description: Stephen Gostkowski kicked a 49-yard field goal with 1:36 left, and the Tennessee Titans remain undefeated after holding off the Jacksonville Jaguars 33-30 Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gostkowski kicks 49-yarder as Titans beat Jaguars 33-30

headlines.description: Jonathan Taylor looked right at home in his first NFL start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor makes hefty workload pay off as Colts beat Vikings

headlines.description: Josh Allen threw for 417 yards and four touchdowns, both career highs, and the Buffalo Bills beat AFC East rival Miami for the fourth consecutive time Sunday, 31-28.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen reaches career high in passing,  Bills beat Dolphins

events.name: San Francisco 49ers at New York Jets
Los Angeles Rams at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: Jared Goff threw three touchdown passes to Tyler Higbee and the Los Angeles Rams beat the Philadelphia Eagles 37-19 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Goff tosses 3 TD passes to Higbee, Rams beat Eagles 37-19

headlines.description: Ben Roethlisberger threw for 311 yards with two touchdowns and an interception and the Pittsburgh Steelers fended off a spirited comeback by the Denver Broncos 26-21 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Steelers knock out Lock, hold off Driskel, Broncos 26-21

events.name: Carolina Panthers at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: Tom Brady got his first win with the Tampa Bay Buccaneers on Sunday, throwing for 217 yards, one touchdown and an interception in a 31-17 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady, Fournette lead Bucs over Panthers 31-17

headlines.description: Kyler Murray threw for 286 yards and a touchdown and ran for two more scores to lead the Arizona Cardinals over the Washington Football Team 30-15 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray runs for 2 TDs, Cardinals roll past Washington 30-15

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: Harrison Butker kicked a 58-yard field goal with 1:55 remaining in overtime, and the Kansas City Chiefs survived a superlative first start by rookie Chargers quarterback Justin Herbert to beat Los Angeles 23-20 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Butker good from 58 in OT, Chiefs survive Herbert's LA debut

headlines.description: Lamar Jackson threw a touchdown pass, Mark Ingram ran for a TD and the Baltimore Ravens added a score on defense to to beat the mistake-prone Houston Texans 33-16 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens extend regular-season run, dominate Texans 33-16

events.name: New England Patriots at Seattle Seahawks

headlines.description: Cam Newton was stopped at the 1-yard line on the final play and the Seattle Seahawks held off the New England Patriots 35-30 on Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks stuff Newton on final play, beat Patriots 35-30
